scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @rrld/server" "npm run dev --workspace @rrld/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @rrld/server && npm run build --workspace @rrld/client
scripts.test:e2e:solo: E2E_STATIC_SOLO_ONLY=true E2E_CLIENT_PORT=5178 playwright test --grep "solo bot demo"
scripts.test:e2e:release: npm run test:e2e:dry && npm run test:e2e:hit && npm run test:e2e:solo
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @rrld/client && npm run typecheck --workspace @rrld/server
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && VITE_BASE_PATH=/ VITE_STATIC_SOLO_ONLY=true npm run build:pages && npm run test:e2e:release
